| `/auto-escalate` | Seamless two-dial escalation ‚Äî model (haiku‚Üísonnet‚Üíopus‚Üífable) AND reasoning effort (low‚Üímedium‚Üíhigh‚Üíxhigh‚Üímax) ‚Äî matched per sub-problem, quality-first: when torn between rungs on quality-relevant work, round UP.
